name: Certified Hardware & Software | Compatibility | openEuler
description: Check hardware and software compatibility with openEuler. Explore servers, cards, and software certified for different openEuler OS versions.

isPartOf.name: openEuler
isPartOf.description: openEuler is an open source Linux distribution platform.

about.name: Hardware and Software Compatibility
about.description: openEuler provides a complete process and tools for hardware compatibility testing, including certified CPUs, drivers, solutions, and virtualization information for different openEuler OS versions.

mainEntity.name: openEuler Compatibility List
mainEntity.description: A searchable database of hardware and software certified for openEuler OS, including servers, network cards, solutions, and virtualization platforms.

variableMeasured.name: CPU Compatibility
variableMeasured.description: Searchable by Architecture, Vendor, Model, OS, CPU, and Date

variableMeasured.name: Driver Compatibility
variableMeasured.description: Searchable by Architecture, OS Version, Type, Chip Vendor, Card Model, and Chip Model

variableMeasured.name: Solution Authentication
variableMeasured.description: Searchable by Architecture, Solution Type, Chip Vendor, Model, OS, and Date

variableMeasured.name: Virtualization Information
variableMeasured.description: Searchable by Architecture, Type, Version, and Date
